summary: KMFA S01-P2 created the canonical project skeleton, Chinese owner entries, governance files, metadata draft, and root registry entry without business implementation or GitHub upload.

KMFA S01-P3 imported the full requirements traceability matrix, added formal no_omission validation, created the full Stage/Phase/Task status registry, and passed the no-omission gate without business implementation or GitHub upload.
KMFA Stage 1 review passed after S01-P1/P2/P3 validation; GitHub upload is allowed only through a clean worktree based on origin/main to avoid non-KMFA dirty state.
KMFA S02-P1 created the metadata directory protocol, identifier contract, public-repo metadata privacy boundary, and metadata_protocol_check without importing raw business data or uploading GitHub.

KMFA S02-P2 created raw manifest append-only rules, derived data versioning rules, frontend/control-event no-raw-write boundaries, and immutability_policy_check without importing raw business data or uploading GitHub.

KMFA S02-P3 created Q0-Q5 quality grade definitions, A/B/C/D report trust grade definitions, release-gate rules, and check_report_grade_gate without importing raw business data, generating reports, reviewing Stage 2, or uploading GitHub.
KMFA Stage 2 review passed after S02-P1/P2/P3 validation and origin/main reconciliation; the reviewed tree is upload-ready for GitHub main.
KMFA Stage 2 reviewed tree was uploaded to GitHub main.
KMFA v1.2 FULL_HTML_NO_OMISSION package was accepted as the future development baseline and Stage 1 was replayed with HTML/UIUX/report samples and private-source boundaries.

KMFA S03-P1 created local file import registration, safe zip extraction, hash/size/import_run/source package metadata, private storage refs, and WPS/OLE guidance without raw file commits or GitHub upload.
KMFA S03-P2 created a source check matrix contract with required source dimensions, exact TaskPack status values, and append-only metadata status events without raw source mutation or GitHub upload.

KMFA S03-P3 created source priority rules, same-source invalidation/rerun metadata events, and cross-source manual-review difference queue entries without raw source mutation, auto-selection, or GitHub upload.
KMFA Stage 3 review passed after fixing the source-priority chain alignment finding; upload requires preserving latest origin/main history and rerunning validation before push.
KMFA Stage 3 reviewed tree was uploaded to GitHub main after rebasing on latest origin/main and rerunning validation.
KMFA S04-P1 created strict amount normalization to integer cents, no-float money scanning, and abnormal-input rejection without field standardization, zero-delta, Stage 4 review, or GitHub upload.
KMFA S04-P2 created field alias mapping, canonical field standardization, and missing-field quality status metadata without raw business data commits, fact layer, Stage 4 review, or GitHub upload.

KMFA S04-P3 added synthetic boundary tests for amount/date/period tools, generated a tool function test report, and fixed Chinese full-date-to-period handling without raw business data, Stage 4 review, or GitHub upload.
KMFA Stage 4 review passed after S04-P1/P2/P3 validation and fixed the owner-readable FEAT-KMFA-016 detail gap; the reviewed tree is upload-ready local-only and has not been pushed to GitHub.
KMFA Stage 4 reviewed tree was uploaded to GitHub main after applying the full Stage 4 stack on latest origin/main and rerunning validation.

KMFA S05-P1 created public-safe A0 file registration for the sales performance package: 8 PDF and 1 Excel inventory records, source package SHA256, A0 candidate JSONL, Q3 machine candidate status, and Q4 not-locked status. Private source zip was not available, so member SHA256 is explicitly pending and legacy CRC/fingerprint is not treated as SHA256. No raw files, business field values, zero-delta, reports, UI, or GitHub upload were included.

KMFA S05-P2 created a public-safe A0 golden fixture field contract and 45 field-level fixture candidates for contract amount, total expense, gross profit, gross margin, and cost category. Private source zip or authorized field CSV was not available, so source anchors and private value hashes remain explicitly pending. No raw files, raw values, normalized values, zero-delta, reports, UI, Q4 confirmation, Q5 baseline, or GitHub upload were included.

KMFA S05-P2 performed a public-safe hash-only partial private backfill: 40 PDF field candidates now have private value hashes and source anchors, while 5 Excel field candidates remain pending. The provided sales performance zip package hash/size did not match the registered package, but its 9 real business member hashes matched the Stage2 Ring4 registry. No raw files, private CSV, raw values, normalized values, zero-delta, reports, UI, Q4 confirmation, Q5 baseline, Stage 5 review, or GitHub upload were included.

KMFA S05-P2 machine-reviewed the remaining Excel A0 candidate and recorded that the workbook is cross-source support, not a safe standalone A0 project baseline. Five Excel fields remain pending and require owner or authorized private mapping resolution. No raw files, business plaintext, private CSV, Q4 confirmation, Q5 baseline, Stage 5 review, or GitHub upload were included.

KMFA S05-P2 published a public-safe owner decision packet for the remaining Excel A0 candidate. The packet allows provide_private_field_mapping, downgrade_to_cross_source_support, or keep_pending decisions, and it does not mark S05-P2 complete. No raw files, business plaintext, private CSV, Q4 confirmation, Q5 baseline, Stage 5 review, or GitHub upload were included.

KMFA S05-P2 added a dedicated Excel owner decision validator covering the decision packet, fixture pending counts, approval/control events, public-safe boundaries, and Q4/Q5 prohibition. It does not resolve the pending Excel fields or permit S05-P3.

KMFA S05-P2 added a public-safe owner decision intake contract and validator for future owner or authorized decision records. The validator checks allowed decision codes, owner/authorized actor roles, forbidden plaintext keys, and Q4/Q5 prohibition. No owner decision record was supplied, so the five Excel fields remain pending and S05-P3 remains blocked.

KMFA S05-P2 added public-safe non-decision templates for provide_private_field_mapping, downgrade_to_cross_source_support, and keep_pending, plus a template validator. Templates are not active owner decisions and do not resolve the five pending Excel fields or permit S05-P3.

KMFA S05-P2 added a completion gate that blocks phase close unless all required private hashes and source anchors are recorded or a resolving active owner/authorized decision is supplied. Current state is blocked as expected: 5 Excel fields pending and decision_code=none. No raw files, business plaintext, private CSV, Q4 confirmation, Q5 baseline, S05-P3, Stage 5 review, or GitHub upload were included.

KMFA S05-P2 added a public-safe owner decision application preview for future owner or authorized decision records. It previews private-hash mapping, cross-source-support downgrade, or keep-pending outcomes without raw values, Q4 confirmation, Q5 baseline, source-layer writes, Stage 5 review, or GitHub upload. Current no-decision state remains blocked as expected.

KMFA S05-P2 recorded an active owner/authorized downgrade decision after read-only review of the private sales-performance and finance packages. The remaining Excel candidate is cross-source support only, excluded from Q4/Q5 A0 baseline, and completion gate is ready without raw values or GitHub upload.

KMFA S05-P3 created a public-safe A0 authority baseline lock: 40 PDF fields are locked as Q5 calculation baseline by hash/source-anchor evidence, 5 Excel fields are excluded by active owner/authorized downgrade decision, and formal reports/GitHub upload remain blocked until Stage 5 review and later release gates.

KMFA Stage 5 review passed local-only after rerunning S05-P1/P2/P3 validators, governance validators, raw file scan, secret scan, and JSON/JSONL parse checks. Review fixed the Stage 5 review evidence and governance status gap. GitHub upload was not performed.

KMFA Stage 5 reviewed tree was uploaded to GitHub main after rebasing on latest origin/main and rerunning S05-P1/P2/P3 validators, governance validators, raw scan, secret scan and JSONL parse checks. Upload did not implement S06 zero-delta, reports, UI or external connectors.

KMFA S06-P1 created a public-safe zero-delta validator for structured integer-cent fields. It compares authoritative and system values field by field, fails on any 1 cent difference, and writes mismatch reports with source, field, authoritative value, system value and difference. No raw business files, metadata/quality runtime result, S06-P2 queue, Stage 6 review, GitHub upload, report, UI or external connector was included.

KMFA S06-P2 created a public-safe PDF/Excel cross-source difference queue. Same-project same-field conflicts enter manual review; auto correction, averaging, rounding masking and auto source selection are forbidden; unresolved differences block report grade A. No raw business files, runtime metadata/quality business difference items, Stage 6 review, GitHub upload, report, UI or external connector was included.

KMFA S06-P3 created public-safe validation evidence output. It generated zero-delta summary, sanitized mismatch index, project validation statuses, and metadata/quality records for zero-delta, data quality and source difference queue status. Metadata stores hash/ref/status/evidence only, with no new field plaintext or raw amount values. Stage 6 review, GitHub upload, lineage, fact layer, report, UI and external connector work were not included.

KMFA Stage 6 review passed local-only after rerunning S06-P1/P2/P3 validators, governance validators, raw/secret scan, JSON/JSONL parse checks and evidence consistency checks. Review fixed the Stage 6 review evidence and governance status gap. GitHub upload was not performed.

KMFA Stage 6 reviewed tree was uploaded to GitHub main after rebasing on latest origin/main and rerunning S06-P1/P2/P3 validators, governance validators, raw scan, secret scan, JSON/JSONL parse checks and evidence consistency checks. Upload did not implement S07 file adapters, reports, UI, fact layer or external connectors.

KMFA S07-P1 created a public-safe finance file adapter with 9 finance support source categories, 45 hash-only field candidates, and 9 read-only field reports. Outputs store source refs, file hashes, source_header_hash/private refs, canonical field keys and quality states only. No raw business files, source header plaintext, raw values, normalized values, WPS scope, redcircle scope, fact layer, report, UI, external connector or GitHub upload was included.

KMFA S07-P2 created a public-safe WPS file adapter with 4 WPS export types, 20 hash-only field mappings, 4 conversion guidance records, 4 read-only field reports, and 1 mapping rule version. Outputs store source refs, converted file hashes, source_header_hash/private refs, canonical field keys, mapping_rule_version_id and quality states only. Native WPS files require conversion to .xlsx or .csv. No raw business files, WPS original files, source header plaintext, raw values, normalized values, redcircle scope, fact layer, report, UI, external connector, Stage 7 review or GitHub upload was included.

KMFA S07-P3 created a public-safe Redcircle export postponement policy with 4 reserved export templates, D15 automatic connector blocked, and future read-only/hash/rollback/manual approval controls. No raw business files, Redcircle raw exports, interface credentials, source header plaintext, field plaintext, raw values, normalized values, Stage 7 review, fact layer, lineage, report, UI, external connector or GitHub upload was included.

KMFA Stage 7 review passed local-only after rerunning S07-P1/P2/P3 validators, governance validators, raw/secret scan, YAML/JSON/JSONL/CSV parse checks and evidence consistency checks. Review fixed the Stage 7 review evidence and governance status gap. GitHub upload was not performed.

KMFA Stage 7 reviewed tree was uploaded to GitHub main after rebasing on latest origin/main and rerunning S07-P1/P2/P3 validators, full KMFA tests, governance validators, raw scan, secret scan, YAML/JSON/JSONL/CSV parse checks and evidence consistency checks. Upload did not implement S08, reports, UI, fact layer, lineage full check or external connectors.

KMFA S08-P1 created a public-safe project composite key with 8 hash-only identity components, integer basis-point weights, 3 match records and 2 manual-review queue records. One missing component does not fully block matching, and below-threshold candidates require human review with auto_merge_allowed=false. No raw business files, field plaintext, fact layer, lineage, report, UI, external connector, Stage 8 review or GitHub upload was included.

KMFA S08-P2 created a public-safe business entity model with 8 entity types, 14 relationships, 32 lifecycle statuses and schema docs/metadata. No raw business files, field plaintext, fact layer, lineage, report, UI, external connector, Stage 8 review or GitHub upload was included.

KMFA S08-P3 created public-safe entity matching quality tests covering same-name project, multiple company entity, multiple account and multiple period scenarios. Medium/high risk cases enter manual review with auto_merge_allowed=false, and entity_matching_report is generated as stage evidence. No raw business files, field plaintext, fact layer, lineage, formal report, UI, external connector, Stage 8 review or GitHub upload was included.

KMFA Stage 8 review passed local-only after rerunning S08-P1/P2/P3 validators, full KMFA tests, governance validators, raw/secret scan, YAML/JSON/JSONL/CSV parse checks and evidence consistency checks. Review fixed the Stage 8 review evidence and governance status gap and corrected the initial schema key assumption in the evidence consistency check. GitHub upload was not performed.

KMFA Stage 8 reviewed tree was uploaded to GitHub main after rebasing on latest origin/main and rerunning S08-P1/P2/P3 validators, full KMFA tests, governance validators, raw scan, secret scan, YAML/JSON/JSONL/CSV parse checks and evidence consistency checks. Upload did not implement S09 fact layer, reports, UI, lineage full check or external connectors.

KMFA S09-P1 created a public-safe project cost fact layer with six metric slots, four project fact records and nine unallocated project cost pool records. It preserves S06/S08 quality blockers and does not implement S09-P2 margin, S09-P3 reconciliation, Stage 9 review, lineage full check, formal reports, UI, external connectors or GitHub upload.

KMFA S09-P2 created a public-safe margin and cash margin layer with four margin records and twelve scope difference summary records. Authority display refs, system recomputed refs and cash margin refs remain separated; differences are queued for S09-P3 reconciliation. It does not implement S09-P3, Stage 9 review, lineage full check, formal reports, UI, external connectors or GitHub upload.

KMFA S09-P3 created public-safe scope reconciliation metadata with twelve reconciliation records and six domain controls covering contract/project revenue, project cost/finance expense, bank/receivable, invoice/contract/tax, R&D/project/personnel evidence, and authority PDF/Excel/system recomputation. Records include reason candidate, basis refs, impact scope, owner/reviewer role, created/closed status and remain pending owner or authorized review. Derived metric rerun, formal reports, Stage 9 review and GitHub upload remain blocked.

KMFA Stage 9 review passed local-only after rerunning S09-P1/P2/P3 validators, full KMFA tests, governance validators, raw/secret scan, YAML/JSON/JSONL/CSV parse checks and evidence consistency checks. Review fixed the Stage 9 review evidence and governance status gap and resolved a high-signal secret scan false positive in a0_golden_fixture.py by renaming a non-secret local hash-source variable. GitHub upload, S10, reports, UI, lineage full check and external connectors were not performed.

KMFA Stage 9 reviewed tree was uploaded to GitHub main after rebasing on latest origin/main and rerunning S09-P1/P2/P3 validators, check_s09_stage_review.py, full KMFA tests, governance validators, raw scan, secret scan, YAML/JSON/JSONL/CSV parse checks and diff check. Upload did not implement S10 report templates, report grade runtime, UI, lineage full check or external connectors.

KMFA S10-P1 created public-safe report templates with two templates and eleven management-readable sections. Project cost special report covers management summary, project margin, cost structure and risks; business overview report covers overview, revenue, invoicing, collection, cash, projects and tax. Outputs inherit v1.2 HTML/report acceptance sample refs and keep formal_report_allowed=false, trusted_grade_assignment_allowed=false, s10_p2_scope=false, s10_p3_scope=false, ui_scope=false, lineage_full_check_scope=false and external_connector_scope=false. Stage 10 review, GitHub upload, formal report runtime, export, UI, lineage full check and external connectors were not performed.

KMFA S10-P2 created a public-safe report grade runtime with two report grade records bound to S10-P1 template version and content hash. Both required reports are locked to grade D because zero-delta failed, 12 reconciliation records remain pending, full lineage evidence is missing and human confirmation for A is missing. complete_trusted_report_display_allowed=false, formal_report_allowed=false, business_decision_basis_allowed=false, s10_p3_scope=false and export_artifact_count=0. Stage 10 review, GitHub upload, export, UI, lineage full check and external connectors were not performed.

KMFA S10-P3 generated public-safe report exports from S10-P1 templates and S10-P2 D grade runtime. Outputs include two HTML reports, two CSV appendices, two Excel-compatible CSV download records and a PDF private-runtime-only export policy. committed_excel_file_count=0, committed_pdf_file_count=0, formal_report_allowed=false, business_decision_basis_allowed=false, stage10_review=false and github_upload=false. Stage 10 review, GitHub upload, UI, lineage full check and external connectors were not performed.

KMFA Stage 10 review passed local-only after rerunning S10-P1/P2/P3 validators, check_s10_stage_review.py, full KMFA tests, governance validators, raw/secret scan, required HTML/no-omission, YAML/JSON/JSONL/CSV parse checks and diff check. KMFA S11-P2 created a public-safe source check board runtime with 13 matrix rows, fixed 11 columns, five allowed statuses, low-interference blue-gray style and status-click detail panel. Formal report use, business decision basis, S11-P3 project cost page, Stage 11 review and GitHub upload remain blocked.

KMFA S11-P3 created a public-safe project cost page runtime with four project page records, nine cost categories, twelve pending reconciliation gates, source evidence, pending matters and a direct-view report preview that keeps grade D visible and quality bypass disabled. Formal report use, business decision basis, Stage 11 review and GitHub upload remain blocked.

KMFA Stage 11 review passed local-only after rerunning S11-P1/P2/P3 validators, check_s11_stage_review.py, full KMFA tests, governance validators, required HTML/no-omission, raw/secret scan, YAML/JSON/JSONL parse checks and diff check. GitHub upload, S12, lineage full check, formal reports and external connectors were not performed; current branch is behind origin/main by one commit after fetch and the final upload gate must reconcile before push.

KMFA Stage 11 reviewed tree was uploaded to GitHub main after rebasing on latest origin/main and rerunning S11-P1/P2/P3 validators, Stage 11 review validator, full KMFA tests, governance validators, required HTML/no-omission, raw/secret scan, parse checks and diff check. KMFA S12-P1 created public-safe manual resolution events with five append-only event records covering field mapping, project matching, difference handling and note. Each event records actor, time, reason, impact scope and version. Approved events cannot be silently updated and must use an appended reverse event. Impact preview, rerun mechanism, Stage 12 review, GitHub upload, lineage full check and formal reports remain blocked.

KMFA S12-P2 created public-safe manual impact previews for all five S12-P1 manual resolution events. Each preview shows affected projects, affected metrics and affected reports before publishing. Three high-risk previews require second confirmation and remain blocked while confirmation is pending. Derived rerun, Stage 12 review, GitHub upload, lineage full check and formal reports remain blocked.

KMFA S12-P3 created a public-safe manual rerun mechanism. Two S12-P2 preview-passed and publish-allowed events invalidate derived cache and rerun field mapping, fact layer, derived metric and report reference records. Three high-risk pending previews do not enter rerun. Same-source consistency passed for both rerun outputs. Stage 12 review, GitHub upload, lineage full check and formal reports remain blocked.

KMFA Stage 12 review passed local-only after rerunning S12-P1/P2/P3 validators, check_s12_stage_review.py, full KMFA tests, governance validators, required HTML/no-omission, raw/secret scan, parse checks and diff check. Review fixed the HANDOFF stale next-step finding. GitHub upload, S13, lineage full check, formal reports, difference closure and external connectors were not performed.

KMFA Stage 12 final GitHub upload completed after rebasing the S12 stack on latest origin/main and rerunning S12-P1/P2/P3 validators, check_s12_stage_review.py, full KMFA tests, governance validators, required HTML/no-omission, raw/secret scan, parse checks, diff check, dry-run push, push and post-push parity. S13, lineage full check, formal reports, difference closure and external connectors were not performed.

KMFA S13-P1 created public-safe financial operating report drafts with four source lanes for operating situation, expense/tax/asset, cash situation and loan detail, plus weekly and monthly draft records and two HTML drafts. Drafts show data status, report grade D, 12 pending reconciliation records and usage limitations. S13-P2, S13-P3, Stage 13 review, GitHub upload, lineage full check, formal reports, external connectors, payment, loan management and tax filing remain blocked.

Drafts show report grade D and 12 pending reconciliation records; S13-P3, Stage 13 review, GitHub upload, lineage full check, formal reports, external connectors, invoicing, payment, bank, tax and legal collection actions remain blocked.

KMFA S13-P3 created public-safe cross-table review artifacts across project, customer, amount and time consistency dimensions.
